title: calamagrostis lagurus
intro: Calamagrostis lagurus, also known as purple oat grass or purple grass, is a species of grass native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis lagurus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
